CustomField.formula: N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Jan__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Feb__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Mar__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Aprl__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_May__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Jun__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Jul__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Aug__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Sept__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Oct__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Nov__c + N_M1_Year_Actual_Revenue_Dec__c
CustomField.label: N-1 Year's Total Actual Revenue
